summary: Implemented Stage 8D accepted finding repair routing, creating deterministic ready AFK repair tasks from accepted ReviewResult findings while skipping waived and needs-HITL findings.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_review_repairs.py tests/test_review_loop.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 316 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Accepted ReviewResult findings create re.evidence: create_repair_tasks_from_review_result creates ready AFK SupervisorTask records using deterministic review/finding IDs, repair goals from RepairTaskDraft, allowed paths, verification commands, and optional source task blockers.

Waived and needs-HITL findings are skipp.evidence: SkippedReviewFinding records report waived and needs_hitl findings while tests assert only accepted findings create repair tasks.

Repair task creation is idempotent for e.evidence: Idempotency tests rerun routing against the same review result and assert no duplicate tasks are created; full planning integrity passed.

Focused tests cover accepted finding tas.evidence: tests/test_review_repairs.py covers accepted task creation, waived/HITL skipping, idempotent reruns, missing allowed path rejection, and deterministic slug-safe task IDs.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 8D diff.

risks: Stage 8D creates repair task rows but intentionally does not execute those repairs.
The routing helper is not exposed as a CLI command yet.
Live review worker launch remains disabled until Codex Exec preflight is resolved.
follow_up_tasks: Shape a later Stage 8 slice to exercise review result ingestion and repair task routing together through an orchestration or CLI surface.
Add repair-loop execution once accepted findings are available from real review lanes.
handoff_notes: Stage 8D adds create_repair_tasks_from_review_result in review_repairs.py. It creates deterministic ready AFK repair tasks for accepted findings, skips waived/HITL findings, and keeps repair execution out of scope.
